    Mark Ng

    Control engineering, techs, photography, more nerd stuff, and then some…



    Photo taken at the base of the Abisko Sky Station, Sweden during summer of 2014 at time 0100. The midnight Sun cast its golden rays on the clouds, producing a majestic fire-like glow.

    Mark Kok Yew Ng

    Reader, Ulster University.
